academic_requirements.summary: Applicants need a bachelor's degree or equivalent and must show background skills in physics, mathematics, chemistry, basic computer sciences, and programming.
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: A minimum three-year undergraduate degree or equivalent is required, with proven skills in physics, mathematics, chemistry, basic computer sciences and programming.
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: Applicants must verify country-based specific entry title and GPA requirements on the University's official entry-title requirements page.

accepted_proofs: Pearson Test of English General (PTE General)
Pearson Test of English Academic (PTE Academic)
exemption_rules: Applicants are exempt if they completed their previous education entirely in English.
Applicants are exempt if they are native English speakers from the countries listed on the official language-requirement page.
IMAT candidates for Medicine and Surgery are exempt under the University's central English-language rule.
language_requirements.deadline: No separate programme-specific English-certificate deadline is stated on the official Astrophysics and Cosmology apply page; applicants should follow the programme application calls.

application_deadline_eu.notes: The official page states that Call Three is only for EU students and non-EU students residing in Italy. Applicants can apply only once per academic year.

application_deadline_non_eu.call_three: Not available for non-EU applicants residing outside Italy; the official page states that Call Three is only for EU students and non-EU students residing in Italy.
application_deadline_non_eu.notes: Applies to non-EU applicants residing outside Italy for Calls One and Two. Applicants can apply only once per academic year.

required_documents.document_name: Valid passport or valid ID card
required_documents.notes: The official apply portal lists a valid passport or a valid ID card for EU or equivalent applicants.
Required only for non-EU applicants already residing in Italy.
The transcript must be official and written or translated into Italian or English.

required_documents.document_name: Upper secondary school certificate or academic qualification
required_documents.notes: Upload it if already obtained, and verify country-based entry-title requirements on the official University page.
Listed in the general official application document list.
Listed in the general official application document list.
Required unless the applicant qualifies for an exemption under the official language-requirement page.

required_documents.document_name: Other programme-specific documents, if requested in the checklist
required_documents.notes: The official apply portal states that some programmes may require different or specific documents, and applicants should check the checklist.
If admitted, applicants must later submit further original and translated/legalised qualification documents. No legalised documents are required at application stage.

entry_exam_or_test.dates: Not applicable; admission is based on published application calls and requirement checks.
entry_exam_or_test.scoring_or_threshold: No entry test or score threshold is stated on the official programme apply page.

source_quotes.quote: proven skills in physics, mathematics, chemistry, basic computer sciences and programming
You can apply for a degree programme only once per Academic Year

uncertainty_notes: No major uncertainty was found in the official programme, apply, document-list, and language-requirement pages reviewed on 2026-06-04.
